{{CargoOrgan
|name=Jade Wings
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10957
|idx=150
|description=Dragon wings bursting with wind energy. Emerald green and elegantly shaped...though roots appear tattered from repeated violent implant procedures.
|skill=
|hp=1626
|def=188
|atk=259
|rush=235
|gene1=Per Dragon Form Tier, {race} RUSH +35
Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|gene2=Wind DMG +90
|gene3=Per Dragon Form Tier, {race} ATK +35
Dragon Form Tiers: 9/9
|gene4=Against main species, HIT +9%
|gene5=Against main species, Crit DMG +15%
|gene7=Wind DMG +4.5% (Awakened)
|}}
